posts.text: Enjoyed spending time with President Trump in my hometown of Cincinnati today. Great conversations with local workers about delivering lower costs, bigger paychecks, and better schools. We’ll do our part in Ohio. 🇺🇸 🇺🇸

posts.text:
The best way to bring down the cost of homes is to increase the supply & cutting the regulations that get in the way. That shouldn’t be controversial, it’s common sense.

Video

posts.text: The President did a great job last night in laying out sensible energy policies to bring down electric bills for everyday Americans. In Ohio, I’ll ensure that hyperscalers pay for their own energy usage, and we’ll produce more energy too, to bring down costs for consumers.

posts.text:
It’s the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence, and I’m grateful to hear tonight from a Commander-in-Chief who is actually proud of our country. Can’t deny that.

posts.text:
The first part of addressing affordability is to undo the inflation crisis created by government overgrowth under Biden, but the other half is to increase wealth—by putting more money back in Americans’ pockets.

posts.text: Democrats like Amy Acton drone on about “educational inequality” while creating the very problem with her disastrous public school closures during COVID. She owes our kids an apology. Now it’s up to us to fix their mess & we will.
